_comment: Fonts + type scale for the components (read through <BrandContext>). The defaults — Inter for text, JetBrains Mono for code — are free, load everywhere, and cover latin-extended glyphs. Swap in your own families; keep fallbacks after the comma.
heading: "Inter", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif

weights._comment: Numeric weights the components reference by role.

_scale: Modular type scale (1.25 ratio) in px — pick sizes from here instead of inventing new ones.
